title: Assigning to the same member twice in struct named assignment does not result in an error
body:
---


Author Name: **Johan Bjork**
Original Redmine Issue: 1145 from https://www.veripool.org

Original Assignee: Johan Bjork 

---

Initializing the same member twice (or more) should fail.
```
a = '{a:1'b1, a:1'b1, b:1'b1}; 

```
